com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.keyboard

Interface ExtKeyboard

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Module

    public interface ExtKeyboard
extends Module
    [External Module] Provides the ability to use the external device as a normal keyboard for digits/character input.

    How to get this module:

         ExtKeyboard extKeyboard = (ExtKeyboard)ExtNSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance().getModule(ModuleType.EXT_KEYBOARD);

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void cancelKeyEntry()
      Cancels current keyboard entry.
      void inputAmount(AmountType amountType, AmountParameters parameters, int timeout, AmountListener amountListener)
      Initiates input amount procedure, the amount entry result will return back by listener.
      void inputData(InputItem[] inputItems, InputParameters parameters, InputListener listener)
      Initiates once or serial times of input data request in PIN pad, and the data entry result will return back by listener.
      void startKeyEntry(Key dataKey, int timeout, KeyboardParameters parameter, KeyboardListener listener)
      Starts key entry, the input will be encrypted by the specified protection key.
      void startKeyEntry(SymmetricKey dataKey, AlgorithmParameters algParams, int timeout, KeyboardParameters parameter, KeyboardListener listener)
      Starts key entry, the input will be encrypted by the specified protection key.

    • Method Detail

      • startKeyEntry

        void startKeyEntry(Key dataKey,
                   int timeout,
                   KeyboardParameters parameter,
                   KeyboardListener listener)
            throws NSDKException
        Starts key entry, the input will be encrypted by the specified protection key.

        Example:

             SymmetricKey key = new SymmetricKey();
     key.setKeyID((byte) 129);
     key.setKeyType(KeyType.DES);

     int timeout = 1;

     KeyboardParameter parameter = new KeyboardParameter();
     parameter.setMaxLen((byte) 8);
     parameter.setMinLen((byte) 4);
     parameter.setPromptID(PromptID.PHONE_NUMBER);
     parameter.setKeyboardMode(KeyboardMode.ALL_CHARACTERS);
     try {
         extKeyboard.startKeyEntry(key, timeout, parameter, new KeyboardListener() {
             @Override
             public void onError(int code,String message) {
                 // Do something when error.
             }

             @Override
             public void onSuccess(int inputLen, byte[] encryptedData) {
                 // Do something when success.
             }

             @Override
             public void onTimeout() {
                 // Do something when timeout.
             }

             @Override
             public void onCancel() {
                 // Do something when cancel.
             }
         });
     } catch (NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the error
     }
        Parameters:
        dataKey - [Required] Key used to encrypt input data.
        timeout - [Required] Timeout between key presses. Unit: second, value range: (0, 90].
        parameter - [Required] Parameters for keyboard entry, see KeyboardParameters.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of keyboard entry.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • startKeyEntry

        void startKeyEntry(SymmetricKey dataKey,
                   AlgorithmParameters algParams,
                   int timeout,
                   KeyboardParameters parameter,
                   KeyboardListener listener)
            throws NSDKException
        Starts key entry, the input will be encrypted by the specified protection key.
        Parameters:
        dataKey - [Required] Key used to encrypt input data.
        algParams - [Optional] The algorithm parameter used to encrypt input data.
        timeout - [Required] Timeout between key presses. Unit: second, value range: (0, 90].
        parameter - [Required] Parameters for keyboard entry, see KeyboardParameters.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of keyboard entry.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • cancelKeyEntry

        void cancelKeyEntry()
             throws NSDKException
        Cancels current keyboard entry.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • inputData

        void inputData(InputItem[] inputItems,
               InputParameters parameters,
               InputListener listener)
        throws NSDKException
        Initiates once or serial times of input data request in PIN pad, and the data entry result will return back by listener.
        Parameters:
        inputItems - [Required] The configuration for the input data procedure, see InputItem.
        parameters - [Required] The parameters for the input data procedure, see InputParameters.
        listener - [Required] Listens to the result of input data procedure, see InputListener.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • inputAmount

        void inputAmount(AmountType amountType,
                 AmountParameters parameters,
                 int timeout,
                 AmountListener amountListener)
          throws NSDKException
        Initiates input amount procedure, the amount entry result will return back by listener.
        Parameters:
        amountType - [Required] The input amount mode, see AmountType.
        parameters - [Required] The parameters of the amount to be set, see AmountParameters.
        timeout - [Required] The input amount process timeout. Unit:s, shall be >0.
        amountListener - [Required] Listens to the result of amount entry.
        Throws:
        NSDKException
